channel.title: llm on Nicole van der Hoeven
channel.description: Recent content in llm on Nicole van der Hoeven

item.title: Evaluating LLM Agents in the Real World: Inside Grafana Assistant
item.description: This video offers a behind-the-scenes look at how we evaluate LLM agents in production at Grafana Labs. Using Grafana Assistant as a case study, I discuss the challenges of evaluating non-deterministic AI systems, the metrics that matter for agent quality, and practical approaches to monitoring and improving AI agent performance over time. The talk covers evaluation frameworks, feedback loops, and lessons learned from running AI agents at scale.

item.title: GenAI Observability in Grafana Cloud: End-to-End Agent Debugging (Demo)
item.description: This demo video accompanies the Grafana ❤️🔥 OpenTelemetry Community Call series, showing a practical walkthrough of GenAI observability in Grafana Cloud. I demonstrate end-to-end debugging of an AI agent, showing how to trace requests through the entire pipeline, identify bottlenecks, and troubleshoot issues in production AI systems using Grafana’s observability stack.

item.title: Observability for GenAI Applications (Grafana ❤️🔥 OpenTelemetry Community Call #4)
item.description: In this community call with my coworker Liudmila Molkova, we dove into the emerging field of observability for Generative AI applications. We explored how to instrument LLM-powered applications using OpenTelemetry, what metrics and traces matter most when monitoring AI workloads, and how to debug issues in complex AI pipelines. The discussion covered prompt tracing, token usage monitoring, latency considerations, and the unique challenges of observing non-deterministic AI systems.

item.title: AI Observability with Ishan Jain (Grafana Office Hours #29)
item.description: In this Grafana Office Hours, Ishan Jain talks about AI Observability with Grafana: what it entails, factors to consider when monitoring and observing LLMs, and how to do it all with Grafana. He is joined by Senior Developer Advocate Nicole van der Hoeven.
